name: Northwest Cioppino
recipeIngredient: 1 or more clams or oysters per person
2 T Olive oil or other oil
recipeInstructions:
1. Thaw fish if frozen and cut into small serving pieces.
2. Cook onion and garlic in oil until onion is tender but not brown.
3. Add tomatoes, tomato sauce, water, parsley, bouillon or chicken broth with salt, basil, oregano, and pepper to the pan. Cover.
4. Simmer gently for about 30 minutes.
5. Add fish chunks; cover and simmer 10 minutes per inch of thickness.
6. Add clams or oysters and shrimp; cover and simmer 5 minutes longer or until fish flakes easily when tested with a fork.
7. Note: Any combination of fish and shellfish may be used in this recipe.
